case_title: MARILYN O'ROURKE VS. THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY O'ROURKE, MARILYN AS TO DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'ROURKE, MARILYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
